audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone at a moderate pace, with no noticeable background noise or emotional inflection.
temporal_description: Two men are standing in a kitchen. The man on the left, wearing a gray sweater, faces the other man and gestures with his right hand while speaking. The man on the right, wearing a dark jacket over a white shirt, faces the first man and listens, occasionally shifting his gaze and posture. Behind them, kitchen cabinets and shelves with various food items and containers are visible. The man on the left moves slightly as he speaks, while the man on the right remains mostly stationary, holding a red cup in his left hand.
